name: Crisp Baked Potato Skins with Chive Dip
recipeInstructions:
- Chive Dip:
1. Combine nonfat milk (1/4 c), nonfat cottage cheese (1 c), lemon juice (1 tbsp), Dijon mustard (1 tbsp), prepared horseradish (1 tbsp), minced garlic clove (1/2 tsp), drained capers (2 tbsp), red onion (3 tbsp, minced), fresh chives (3 tbsp, minced), black pepper (1/2 tsp, freshly cracked), and salt (optional) in a blender or food processor. Blend until creamy.
2. Allow the dip to set at room temperature for at least 30 minutes or refrigerate for up to 2 hours.
- Potato Skins:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Combine herbs and spices, then set aside.
3. Slice off 4 1/4-inch thick sides from the potatoes, leaving a potato rectangle.
4. Refrigerate the potato rectangles, covered with water, if needed.
5. Place potato skins cut side up on a baking sheet and sprinkle with herb and spice mixture.
6. Bake in the center of the oven for 30 minutes.
7. Remove pan from oven; spray skins with a fine mist of water.
8. Return to the oven for another 15 minutes, or until soft.
Serving size: 1 skin and 1 tbsp dip
Calories: 46
Fat: 0.7 g
Cholesterol: 0.2 mg
Sodium (without added salt): 44.9 mg
